title_link:
News - Hippiman/Conscience released a New Year game named Dizzy Rescues
Santa, I fixed several errors in my 3D engine, Polist culturologist Piotr Marecki who went to summer DiHalt

translated the questions.
title_h1: ACNews 64 - News - Hippiman/Conscience released a New Year game named Dizzy Rescues Santa, I fixed several errors in my 3D engine, Polist culturologist Piotr Marecki who went to summer DiHalt with Yerzmyey, wrote a big questionnaire for his future book. I translated the questions.
